projects.name: Smart University Management System
projects.description: Role-based academic and placement management system built with Express.js, PostgreSQL, and Node.js. Features BCNF-normalized schemas and RBAC.

philosophy.approach: Prefers building real systems over chasing buzzwords. Learning comes from hands-on debugging, iteration, and consistent practice.
